message:
style(io): reformat long Err return in fromstring parse_tokens closure

Wrap the `IOError::ReadPayloadIncomplete` error constructor across
multiple lines in `fromstring`'s `parse_tokens` closure to satisfy
rustfmt line-length conventions.  No logic change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
